title: NR31 0DN, C & L Waste Oil Collection Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/NP3038MB/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: C & L Waste Oil Collection Limited Installation name: Great Yarmouth Oil Reclamation Facility Permit number: EPR/NP3038MB/V004  "
